title: Dropdown Menu Component
content:
## Dropdown Menu Component

This module provides a set of reusable components for creating dropdown menus, built on top of `@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu`.

### Key Exports:

*   **`DropdownMenu`**: The root component for the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuTrigger`**: The component that triggers the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuContent`**: The content of the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuItem`**: An individual item within the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`**: A checkbox item within the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuRadioItem`**: A radio item within the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuLabel`**: A label for grouping or describing menu items.
*   **`DropdownMenuSeparator`**: A separator line between menu items.
*   **`DropdownMenuShortcut`**: Displays a keyboard shortcut associated with a menu item.
*   **`DropdownMenuGroup`**: Groups related menu items.
*   **`DropdownMenuPortal`**: Portals the dropdown menu content to a different part of the DOM.
*   **`DropdownMenuSub`**: Enables nested sub-menus.
*   **`DropdownMenuSubContent`**: The content of a sub-menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuSubTrigger`**: The trigger for a sub-menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuRadioGroup`**: Used to group radio items within a dropdown.

### Usage Example:

```tsx
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuCheckboxItem,
  DropdownMenuRadioItem,
  DropdownMenuSub,
  DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSubContent,
  DropdownMenuRadioGroup,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

function MyDropdown() {
  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <button>Open Menu</button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56">
        <DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Profile
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset disabled>
          Log out
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSub>
          <DropdownMenuSubTrigger inset>
            More Tools
          </DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuSubContent>
            <DropdownMenuItem>
              Scan Project
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem>
              Generate Report
            </DropdownMenuItem>
          </DropdownMenuSubContent>
        </DropdownMenuSub>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuLabel>Settings</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem checked>Enable notifications</DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
        <DropdownMenuRadioGroup value="default">
          <DropdownMenuLabel>Theme</DropdownMenuLabel>
          <DropdownMenuRadioItem value="light">Light</DropdownMenuRadioItem>
          <DropdownMenuRadioItem value="dark">Dark</DropdownMenuRadioItem>
        </DropdownMenuRadioGroup>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  );
}

export default MyDropdown;
```
